DataRequest.techniqueName: Search Open Technical Databases: Scan Databases
DataRequest.Name: Recon Websites Traffic / SCW

SubPattern.name: Recon_Sites
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: (eventType="Apache-Web-Request-Success" OR eventType="AO-WUA-IIS-Web-Request-Success") AND (httpReferrer="censys.io/cert-annotator" OR httpReferrer="Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; CensysInspect/1.1; +https://about.censys.io/)" OR httpReferrer="CheckHost (https://check-host.net/)")
